questions.question: The Tamil Nadu Industrial Development Corporation (TIDCO) was established to:
options: Promote and facilitate industrial development in Tamil Nadu — set up joint ventures, provide equity participation, and develop industrial estates
questions.explanation: TIDCO (1965): TN's state government industrial promotion company. Functions: promotes investment, sets up joint ventures with private companies, participates in equity of industrial projects, and develops sector-specific parks. Examples of TIDCO JVs: TANCEM (cement), TANTRANSCO (power), TIDEL Park (IT park in Chennai).

questions.question: TIDCO (Tamil Nadu Industrial Development Corporation) was established in:
questions.explanation: TIDCO established in 1965 as a state-level industrial development corporation. Promotes large and medium industries in Tamil Nadu through equity participation, investment promotion, and infrastructure.

questions.question: Tamil Nadu's SIPCOT (State Industries Promotion Corporation of Tamil Nadu) primarily promotes:
options: Medium and large industries by developing industrial parks and SEZs
questions.explanation: SIPCOT (1971): develops industrial parks, estates, and SEZs for medium/large industries in Tamil Nadu. Has 60+ industrial parks. SIDCO (1970) handles small industries.
